title: Target secondary node initiated cancel of conditional pscell change
abstract: A method (800) performed by a T-SN for cancelling a conditional PSCell, change (CPC). The method includes the T-SN receiving (s802) a request for a CPC configuration for a UE, wherein the request was transmitted by a first network node (NN), and the UE is connected to the first NN and is also connected to a second NN. The method also includes the T-SM transmitting (s804) to the first NN a response to the request, the response including the CPC configuration for the UE. The method further includes, after transmitting the response, the T-SN transmitting (s806) to the first NN a cancellation indication indicating that the CPC configuration for the UE is cancelled.
claims: Claims 1. A method (800) performed by a target secondary node, T-SN (608), for cancelling a conditional primary secondary cell, PSCell, change, the method comprising: receiving (s802) a request for a conditional PSCell change, CPC, configuration for a user equipment, UE (602), wherein the request was transmitted by a first network node, NN (604, 606), and the UE is connected to the first NN and is also connected to a second NN (604, 606); transmitting (s804) to the first NN a response to the request, the response including the CPC configuration for the UE; and after transmitting the response, transmitting (s806) to the first NN a cancellation indication indicating that the CPC configuration for the UE is cancelled. 2. The method of claim 1 , further comprising, after receiving the request, allocating resources for the UE. 3. The method of claim 2, wherein the first NN is a master node, MN, and the second NN is a source secondary node, S-SN. 4. The method of claim 2, wherein the second NN is a master node, MN, and the first NN is a source secondary node, S-SN. 5. The method of any one of claims 1-4, further comprising, after determining to send the cancelling indication, performing at least one of: releasing resources that were allocated to the UE in response to receiving the request, or stopping supervision of a timer. 6. The method of any one of claims 1-5, wherein the CPC configuration comprises an RRCReconfiguration message. 7. The method of claim 6, wherein the RRCReconfiguration message is for a target candidate cell. 39 8. A method (900) performed by a master node, MN (604), for cancelling a conditional primary secondary cell, PSCell change, the method comprising: receiving (s902) a cancellation indication transmitted by a target secondary node, T-SN (608), indicating that a conditional PSCell change, CPC, configuration previously provided to a user equipment, UE (602), is cancelled; and after receiving the cancellation indication, reconfiguring (s904) the UE. 9. The method of claim 8, wherein reconfiguring the UE comprises causing the UE to release the CPC configuration. 10. The method of claim 8, wherein the cancellation indication comprises information identifying one or more candidate PSCells served by the T-SN, and reconfiguring the UE comprises causing the UE to release the identified candidate PSCells cells from the CPC configuration. 11. The method of claim 8, 9 or 10, further comprising: after reconfiguring the UE, sending a confirmation to a source secondary node, S-SN, that the UE has been successfully reconfigured. 12. The method of claim 8, 9, or 10, further comprising: after receiving the cancellation indication, transmitting to a source secondary node, S-SN, a message for indicating the cancellation.. 13. The method of claim 12, wherein the message for indicating the cancellation includes a list of cells to be cancelled. 14. The method of claim 12 or 13, further comprising: receiving a new Secondary Cell Group, SCG, RRCReconfiguration transmitted by the S- SN. 40 15. The method of claim 12, 13 or 14, further comprising taking into account cancelation of one or more candidate PSCells by the T-SN. 16. The method of embodiment 14, wherein the new SCG RRCReconfiguration includes a list of candidate PSCells to be released from the CPC configuration. 17. The method of any one of claims 8-16, further comprising: prior to receiving the cancellation indication, transmitting to the T-SN a request for a CPC configuration; and receiving from the T-SN a response to the CPC preparation request, the response including a CPC configuration for the UE. 18. The method of claim 17, wherein the CPC configuration for the UE is included in an RRCReconfiguration message. 19. The method of any one of claims 8-18, further comprising: sending a message to a S-SN indicating that PSCells previously configured in a CPC configuration and belonging to the T-SN have been released from the CPC configuration; and receiving a message from the S-SN informing that modified CPC configuration has been taken into account. 20. A method (1000) performed by a source second node, S-SN (606), for cancelling a conditional primary secondary cell, PSCell, change, the method comprising: receiving (sl002) from a master node, MN (604), a message indicating cancellation of at least a first candidate PSCell; and sending (si 004) to the MN a response message responsive to the indication message. 21. The method of claim 20, wherein the response message comprises a reconfiguration message for a user equipment, UE. 41 22. The method of claim 21, wherein the reconfiguration message includes an indication for indicating to the UE that at least the first candidate PSCell is to be released. 23. The method of claim 20, further comprising receiving a confirmation transmitted by the MN, wherein the confirmation indicates that the UE has been successfully reconfigured. 24. The method of claim 20 or 21, wherein the reconfiguration message comprises a secondary cell group, SCG, RRCReconfiguration. 25. The method of any one of claims 20-24, wherein the request message contains a list of cell identifiers, each cell identifier in the list identifying a candidate PSCell to be cancelled. 26. A computer program (1143) comprising instructions (1144) which when executed by processing circuitry (1102) of a network node (1100), causes the network node to perform the method of any one of claims 1-25. 27. A carrier containing the computer program of claim 26, wherein the carrier is one of an electronic signal, an optical signal, a radio signal, and a computer readable storage medium (1142). 28. A network node (1100), the network node being configured to: receive a request for a conditional PSCell change, CPC, configuration for a user equipment, UE (602), wherein the request was transmitted by a first network node, NN (604, 606), and the UE is connected to the first NN and is also connected to a second NN (604, 606); transmit to the first NN a response to the request, the response including the CPC configuration for the UE; and after transmitting the response, transmit to the first NN a cancellation indication indicating that the CPC configuration for the UE is cancelled. 29. The network node of claim 28, wherein the network node is further configured to perform the method of any one of claims 2-7. 30. A network node (1100), the network node being configured to: receive a cancellation indication transmitted by a target secondary node, T-SN (608), indicating that a conditional PSCell change, CPC, configuration previously provided to a user equipment, UE (602), is cancelled; and after receiving the cancellation indication, reconfigure the UE. 31. The network node of claim 30, wherein the network node is further configured to perform the method of any one of claims 9-19. 32. A network node (1100), the network node being configured to receive from a master node, MN (604), a message indicating cancellation of at least a first candidate PSCell; and send to the MN a response message responsive to the indication message. 33. The network node of claim 32, wherein the network node is further configured to perform the method of any one of claims 21-25. 34. The network node of any one of claims 28-33, wherein the network node comprises: a storage medium (1142); and processing circuitry (1102) coupled to the storage medium (1142).
